title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero from Cursor describes how agentic systems can break past the 40% productivity plateau of traditional AI coding assistants by automating the entire software development lifecycle. The talk covers agent teams for bug triage, security review, growth experimentation, and organizational changes needed to leverage agent-first workflows.
